assertions.title: Edit Profile button shows edit form

steps.observed: Profile page with 'Edit your profile' button
Edit form displayed with Name='Stefano' pre-filled

assertions.title: Edit form cancel returns to display mode

steps.observed: Name changed to 'Modified Name' in form

steps.expected: Return to display mode with original name
steps.observed: Returned to display mode, original name 'Stefano' preserved

steps.expected: Save and return to display mode with new name
steps.observed: Returned to display mode, name shows 'NewName456', API confirms persisted

evidence.network: API PUT /api/profile returned updated profile with name 'NewName456'

assertions.title: Reset Profile clears profile and shows onboarding

steps.observed: UI shows cleared state (no Edit/Reset buttons) but API still returns profile data with name 'NewName456'

evidence.network: API GET /api/profile still returns profile after reset click

assertions.issues: Reset button does not actually clear profile data. UI enters a cleared state but API still has the profile. Inconsistent behavior - after reset, home page still shows 'Welcome, NewName456' but profile page shows no name.

assertions.title: Profile page displays all profile fields

steps.expected: Show name, bio (if set), and action buttons
steps.observed: Profile page shows 'Name: NewName456' with 'Edit your profile' and 'Reset your profile to default' buttons

frictions.description: First save attempt with 'Test User 123' did not persist - had to retry with 'NewName456'

summary: Tested 5 profile assertions: 4 passed (VAL-PROFILE-001, 002, 003, 005), 1 failed (VAL-PROFILE-004: Reset does not clear profile data)
